title: Kajis fate
wikitext:
[]: Kaji's fate             Quote Post by Asuka'sBigBrother » Sat Feb 10, 2018 6:34 pm You'd think Kaji is dead, but he was in instrumentality... So does that mean Kaji is alive? And just how long do you have to be ded 4 to stay ded?

[]: Re: Kaji's fate             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat Feb 10, 2018 7:56 pm Metaphysics, son.

[]: Re: Kaji's fate             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Feb 11, 2018 6:14 pm I tend to think of RQ as really not being limited by time of death, really. We see her appering to Ritsuko and Misato, both of whom died at least half and hour-ish before 3I began. So why couldn't she go back a few weeks earlier to harvest Kaji's soul? This does bring up the problem of who she *chooses* to harvest or not, unless she just harvests anyone. Potentially, this could include all the three billion people dead after 2I, or even before that.

[]: Re: Kaji's fate             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Feb 11, 2018 6:27 pm FelipeFritschF wrote: Potentially, this could include all the three billion people dead after 2I, or even before that.

[]: Re: Kaji's fate             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Feb 11, 2018 6:47 pm Well, don't they last an indefinite time in the chamber of Guf before use? And Lilith's and Adam's seem pretty resilient, even surviving being split. And the background of Buddhist reincarnation surely requires the soul to be immortal.

[]: Re: Kaji's fate             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 12, 2018 10:17 am pwhodges wrote: Well, don't they last an indefinite time in the chamber of Guf before use?

[]: Re: Kaji's fate             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Mon Feb 12, 2018 11:29 am During Third Impact, when everyone is getting turned into that delicious orange flavoured goop, there's a shot in one of the hallways of NERV that shows a soldier's severed arm clutching a walkie talkie, with the end of his arm being reverted to LCL. The shot cuts to a wider view of the hallway, pans up, and is filled with uniforms of NERV personnel and soldiers, all surrounded by and filled with, LCL. This confirms that anyone who was ever alive was converted into LCL and was able to join Instrumentality.

[]: Re: Kaji's fate             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 12, 2018 11:38 am "Everyone who was ever alive"? Not hardly. The recently deceased? Yes.

[]: Re: Kaji's fate             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Mon Feb 12, 2018 11:46 am Reichu wrote: "Everyone who was ever alive"? Not hardly. The recently deceased? Yes.

[]: Re: Kaji's fate             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 12, 2018 12:25 pm That appears to be the case, yes. Episode 21' wrote: Woman C (left · radio) " All A.T. Fields are being released !" (...) Man N (right) "Even if it's only for point one seconds, get [Adam] to use up as much of its Anti A.T. Field energy as possible!"
